studyName: Genome-Wide Association Study of HIV-1 Host Genetics Among Injection Drug Users

tables.description: Subject ID, age, sex, ancestry, age at HIV viral load measure, age first used amphetamine, opioids, cocaine, heroin, age first used sedatives, times used amphetamine, cocaine, opioid, heroin, anal sex in the past 6 months, HIV status, assigned HIV risk group, multiple sex partners in the past year, and ever had sexually transmitted disease among participants with or without HIV-1 and involved in the "Genome-Wide Association Study of HIV-1 Host Genetics Among Injection Drug Users" project.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: age
variables.description: Reported age of participant

variables.name: age_hiv
variables.description: Age at HIV viral load measure

variables.name: amphet_age_ons
variables.description: Age first used amphetamine

variables.name: amphet_ever
variables.description: Ever used opioids

variables.name: amphet_ever_inj
variables.description: Ever injected opioids

variables.name: amphet_inj_30d
variables.description: Times injected amphetamine in past 30 days

variables.name: amphet_non_30d
variables.description: Times used amphetamine, not injected, in past 30 days

variables.name: anal
variables.description: Had receptive anal sex in the past 6 months, indicator used in LCA

variables.name: ancestry_selfreport
variables.description: Self-reported ancestry of participant

variables.name: coc_age_ons
variables.description: Age first used cocaine

variables.name: coc_ever
variables.description: Ever used opioids

variables.name: coc_ever_inj
variables.description: Ever injected opioids

variables.name: cocaine_inj_30d
variables.description: Times injected cocaine in past 30 days

variables.name: cocaine_non_30d
variables.description: Times used cocaine not injected in past 30 days

variables.name: gwassex
variables.description: Genotype identified sex

variables.name: heroin_age_ons
variables.description: Age first used heroin

variables.name: heroin_case
variables.description: Used heroin 10+ times in the past 30 days

variables.name: heroin_ever
variables.description: Ever used heroin

variables.name: heroin_ever_inj
variables.description: Ever injected heroin

variables.name: heroin_inj_30d
variables.description: Times injected heroin in past 30 days

variables.name: heroin_non_30d
variables.description: Times used heroin not injected in past 30 days

variables.name: hivstat
variables.description: HIV status

variables.name: inj_age_ons
variables.description: Age first injected drugs

variables.name: inj_case
variables.description: Injected drugs 10+ times in the past 30 days

variables.name: inj_ever
variables.description: Ever injected drugs all participants are flagged yes

variables.name: inj_freq
variables.description: Frequency of injection any drug in the past 30 days

variables.name: lca_group
variables.description: Latent Class Analysis (LCA) assigned HIV risk group used in frequency matching

variables.name: mj_30d
variables.description: Days used marijuana in past 30 days

variables.name: mj_age_ons
variables.description: Age first used marijuana

variables.name: mj_case
variables.description: Used marijuana 10+ days in the past 30 days

variables.name: mj_ever
variables.description: Ever use marijuana

variables.name: mpartners
variables.description: Multiple sex partners in the past year, indicator used in LCA

variables.name: needleshare
variables.description: Sharing needles in the past 30 days, indicator used in LCA

variables.name: opioid_age_ons
variables.description: Age first used opioids

variables.name: opioid_case
variables.description: Used nonheroin opioid 10+ times in the past 30 days

variables.name: opioid_ever
variables.description: Ever used opioids

variables.name: opioid_ever_inj
variables.description: Ever injected opioids

variables.name: opioid_inj_30d
variables.description: Times injected opioid other than heroin in past 30 days

variables.name: opioid_non_30d
variables.description: Times used opioid other than heroin, not injected, in past 30 days

variables.name: sed_age_ons
variables.description: Age first used sedatives

variables.name: sed_ever
variables.description: Ever used sedatives

variables.name: sed_ever_inj
variables.description: Ever injected sedatives

variables.name: sex_selfreport
variables.description: Participant reported sex

variables.name: sexwork
variables.description: Participant ever traded sex for drugs or money, indicator used in LCA

variables.name: site
variables.description: Blinded site indicator site 1 vs. 2

variables.name: stis
variables.description: Ever had sexually transmitted disease (excluding HIV), indicator used in LCA

variables.name: surveyyear
variables.description: Year participated in UHS (1986-2002)

variables.name: totamphet_30d
variables.description: Times used amphetamine, any route, in past 30 days

variables.name: totamphet_case
variables.description: Used amphetamine 10+ times in the past 30 days

variables.name: totcoc_30d
variables.description: Times used cocaine, any route, in past 30 days

variables.name: totcoc_case
variables.description: Used any cocaine 10+ times in past 30 days

variables.name: totopioid_age_ons
variables.description: Age first used heroin or other opioids

variables.name: totopioid_case
variables.description: Used any opioid 10+ times in past 30 days

variables.name: totopioid_ever
variables.description: Ever used heroin or other opioids

variables.name: totopioid_inj_30d
variables.description: Times injected any opioid in past 30 days

variables.name: totopioid_non_30d
variables.description: Times used any opioid, not injected, in past 30 days

variables.name: totopioid_tot_30d
variables.description: Times used any opioid, any route, in past 30 days

variables.name: viralload_cperml
variables.description: Viral Load copies/mL

variables.name: viralload_log10
variables.description: Viral load log 10

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, histological type of sample, and tumor status of samples of participants with or without HIV-1 and involved in the "Genome-Wide Association Study of HIV-1 Host Genetics Among Injection Drug Users" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID

tables.description: Subject ID, sex, and consent group of participants with or without HIV-1 and involved in the "Genome-Wide Association Study of HIV-1 Host Genetics Among Injection Drug Users" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: Subject ID and sample ID of participants with or without HIV-1 and involved in the "Genome-Wide Association Study of HIV-1 Host Genetics Among Injection Drug Users" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
